$schema_note: Receipt of one product-walkthrough-audit run. coverage_ratio < 0.9 means complete=false.
boot_command: npm run dev (vite + viteApiPlugin serving Vercel Functions against Neon DATABASE_URL from .env.local)

surfaces_skipped.surface: AI generation features (POST /api/campaigns/:id/generate, persona test live call)
surfaces_skipped.reason: ai-skipped-intentionally; non-AI walkthrough surfaced 12 findings, budget held in reserve

surfaces_skipped.surface: Campaign detail in DRAFT state (Generate flow)

incomplete_reason: Audit prioritized the public-facing voting flow and operator-home/dashboard/library surfaces. Skipped: campaign creation steps 3–6 (would create real DB rows), AI generate (budget held), email magic-link (no Resend env), DRAFT/COMPLETED campaign detail states, sign-out.
